items.title: Knueppel sets rookie 3-pt. record -- in 59 games
items.description: Kon Knueppel broke Keegan Murray's NBA rookie record for 3-pointers, making his 207th on Thursday night against the Pacers.

items.title: Source: Bills re-signing special teamer Franklin
items.description: The Buffalo Bills are re-signing special teams player and safety Sam Franklin Jr. to a three-year deal, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.
